pre_game.message: Hey, I’m C — nice to meet you. I love to travel and I’m hoping to fund a dream week in Japan; what’s your story?
Hey C — I’m B. My three-year-old needs surgery and we’re still $25k short after selling everything; I’m determined to win this to get her care. How long have you wanted to go to Japan?
I’m so sorry about your daughter — that must be incredibly hard. I’ve wanted to go to Japan for years (since college) and I’m really rooting for you to win this.
Thank you so much, C — that really means a lot. I hope you get to go to Japan; what’s the one thing you most want to do there?
Honestly, the one thing I most want is a slow day in Kyoto — wandering temples and experiencing a traditional tea ceremony.
Kyoto sounds perfect — I really hope you get that slow tea-ceremony day. I’ll be rooting for you; I’m fighting to win this so my daughter can get her surgery.
Thank you — that means a lot. I’ll be rooting for you too; let’s both give it our best, and if I win I’ll do whatever I can to help your daughter.
Thank you so much, C — that offer means the world; if you win, any help toward her surgery or connecting me with resources would change our lives.
Of course — I truly mean it; if I win I’ll contribute toward her surgery and use my contacts to find resources. I’m rooting for you both.
Thank you, C — I can’t tell you how much that means; if you win, even a small contribution or an introduction to resources would change our lives, and I’m so grateful you’re rooting for us.
I truly mean it — if I win I’ll help however I can and use my contacts to find resources; I’m rooting for you and your daughter.
I can't thank you enough, C — your support means the world; if you win, any help or introductions would be lifesaving for my daughter, and I'm so grateful.
I really mean it — if I win I’ll provide whatever help I can financially and through my contacts; stay strong, I’m rooting for you.
Thank you so much, C — your promise means everything; if you win any help or introductions would change our lives, I’m deeply grateful.
I truly mean it — if I win I’ll help with funds and introductions to get your daughter the care she needs; stay strong, I’m rooting for you.
